isi.lyrics:
Lyric Herhums - 환희

Romanization

bichi swineun malgeun bam
heomureul beonneunda
seulpi uneun dalbit

geudaeyeo jichijineun ma
haneurui kkumeul anggoseo
eoneu han iseulbi oneun nare
gyeomheohi eodumeul gareul numbusin bitgwa hamkke

nalgaereul pyeolchinda
gipi sum chamgo
deuriuneun dalbit

goyohan geomeun bam
hanaui iseulbi anggoseo
gamanhi beoreojin areumdaum

eonjena geuraetdeon geotcheoreom
haneure amuri eodumi jitdeorado
hwanhi kkaeeona

Hangeul

빛이 쉬는 맑은 밤
허물을 벗는다
슬피 우는 달빛

그대여 지치지는 마
하늘의 꿈을 안고서
어느 한 이슬비 오는 날에
겸허히 어둠을 가를 눈부신 빛과 함께

날개를 펼친다
깊이 숨 참고
드리우는 달빛

고요한 검은 밤
하나의 이슬비 안고서
가만히 벌어진 아름다움

언제나 그랬던 것처럼
하늘에 아무리 어둠이 짙더라도
환히 깨어나

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Herhums - 흰 바람

Romanization

barame huiyeojilkka

swil sae eopsi chumchuneun
ipsae wihae oreun dal
dal biche jichyeo haeneun jeomunda

soksagideut bureumyeo
nune areunggeorineun
bicheul ttara eorumanjinda

haneure hwinallinda

Hangeul

바람에 희여질까

쉴 새 없이 춤추는
잎새 위해 오른 달
달 빛에 지쳐 해는 저문다

속삭이듯 부르며
눈에 아른거리는
빛을 따라 어루만진다

하늘에 휘날린다

isi.driveFileNames: LambC & Milena - What can we leave behind.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric LambC & Milena - What can we leave behind

Romanization

Slip through the tides

watch the sun rise on your

face as you smile

you make me wanna smile back again

Leaving our marks

waves sweeping up all our traces

can’t define, what can we leave behind

Loved ones keep fading

its hard to keep faking

But this journey keeps going

Adversities waiting

At the end my adventure

I hope to see my savior

Welcome back little angel

We’ll feast on this table

Look in the dark

It’s where I will find you

I left it all behind, yeah I miss you all the time

Loved ones keep fading

its hard to keep faking

But this journey keeps going

Adversities waiting

At the end my adventure

I hope to see my savior

Welcome back little angel

We’ll feast on this table

Loved ones keep fading

its hard to keep faking

But this journey keeps going

I hope to see my savior

Welcome back little angel

We’ll feast on this table

isi.driveFileNames: LambC & John OFA Rhee - How we love.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric LambC & John OFA Rhee - How we love

Romanization

There’s no day without some kind of funny biz

You’re the kind that doesn’t know it but it hits

Watching you is like I’m watching my own kid

Then again you keep me standing on my feet

And how How we love there’s nothing better

How we promised our forevers

Tell me what your heart desires oh

And how We’ll be dancing through endeavors

Holding hands we’ll be together yes we’ll be

Loving is easy Yeah you make it easy



Late night walks turn into games of “what if, ands”

Building blocks of stories wondering we’re we’ll end

Would it be bad if I drift away instead?

Cuz this is the moment I want to keep inside my head

And how How we love there’s nothing better

How we promised our forevers

Tell me what your heart desires oh

And how We’ll be dancing through endeavors

Holding hands we’ll be together yes we’ll be

And how How we love there’s nothing better

How we promised our forevers

Holding hands we’ll be together yes we’ll be

Holding hands we’ll be together yes we’ll be

How we promised our forevers

Tell me what your heart desires oh

And how We’ll be dancing through endeavors

Holding hands we’ll be together yes we’ll be

Loving is easy Yeah you make it easy

isi.lyrics:
Lyric LambC - Motion

Romanization

When your tear drops I’ll be your ocean

Cry for savior I’ll be your devotion

When you break down driven by emotion I’ll be with you there in your motion

Counting stars lose track in your focus

Crowns of kings fall short in your notion

When you feel unsafe inside your haven

know that i’ll be there in your motion

Oh when you weep in my arms I won’t falter

Shadows will lurk but our hearts will rejoice

through the storm though the waves will come

crashing down our hull but I’ll be your ocean

Oh when you weep in my arms I won’t falter

Shadows will lurk but our hearts will rejoice

through the storm though the waves will come

crashing down our hull but I’ll be your ocean

Oh when you weep in my arms I won’t falter

Shadows will lurk but our hearts will rejoice

through the storm though the waves will come

crashing down our hull but I’ll be your ocean

I’ll be your devotion There in your motion

through the storm though the waves will come

crashing down our hull but I’ll be your ocean

Oh when you weep in my arms I won’t falter

crashing down our hull but I’ll be your ocean

Oh when you weep in my arms I won’t falter

crashing down our hull but I’ll be your ocean

I’ll be your devotion There in your motion

isi.driveFileNames: LambC - Inspiration comes and goes, Record it straight onto my phone.mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric LambC - Inspiration comes and goes, Record it straight onto my phone

Romanization

Gotta wait for the moment

Inspiration come and goes

record it straight onto my phone

and the let the music overflow

Please excuse me a minute

Cuz this melody and groove

won’t last much longer if i snooze

won’t let go

Fancy cars, what a dream

Analog, yeah thats for me

spend my cash on stupid things

that might be interesting

Will you come, or will you not Like my cat, you’re hard to grasp

I kid you not you’re the only one waiting on for

I feel lost in everything i do

i know its not good news for you

when everything points back to you

But every time you make a move

i’m ready for the mysteries to be seen

isi.lyrics:
Lyric LambC & Suyo - Solace

Romanization

Lay by me

Tell me your pain i’ll heed

Your highs and lows will be

our memories to seed

Stay with me

Don’t be afraid i’ll be

your shelter and guide

we’ll feel alive

I’ll be the bed you sleep

I’ll be the morning breeze

I’ll be the one song you put on repeat

dancing along through this night carefree

I’ll be your solace tree

I’ll be your shade in green

I’ll be one standing tall just believe

One thing i know you’re the air that i breathe

Lay with me

counting the stars I’ll see

light in your eyes yeah we’ll so feel alive

holding you close while we drift through the skies

You don’t need to rush our way

I’ll be by your side you and I hope you know our hearts stay true

no matter how lost I am I’ll keep coming back to the start

I’ll be the bed you sleep

I’ll be the morning breeze

I’ll be the one song you put on repeat

dancing along through this night carefree

I’ll be your solace tree

I’ll be your shade in green

I’ll be one standing tall just believe

One thing i know you’re the air that i breathe

Air that i breathe

Hangeul

Lay by me

Don’t be afraid i’ll be

your shelter and guide

we’ll feel alive

dancing along through this night carefree

I’ll be one standing tall just believe

One thing i know you’re the air that i breathe

Lay with me

counting the stars I’ll see

light in your eyes yeah we’ll so feel alive

holding you close while we drift through the skies

You don’t need to rush our way

I’ll be by your side you and I hope you know our hearts stay true

no matter how lost I am I’ll keep coming back to the start

I’ll be the bed you sleep

I’ll be the morning breeze

I’ll be the one song you put on repeat

dancing along through this night carefree

I’ll be your solace tree

I’ll be your shade in green

I’ll be one standing tall just believe

One thing i know you’re the air that i breathe

Air that i breathe

Romanization

upstairs now I’m stuck in my hotel lobby

shit whats wrong with me

isi.lyrics:
Lyric LambC - Everything (feat. blah)

Romanization

These days i don’t feel like keeping up



Somedays i don’t feel like waking up



There’s so much divide between all parties can’t resolve



But thankfully I have you to call



I’ve got everything I need

You’re the one thing I’ll never leave



When the world breaks down and I’m on my knees



I’ll be with you as long as I can breathe

I’ve got everything I need you’re all i need



nan soljikhi pyohyeoneun jal mothaneunde



i malmaneun haejugo sipeo



harujongil bogo isseodo mojareul mangkeum



neol saranghago isseo



I’m falling in love



o uriui modeun sunggani challaui sajini doegireul



I’ve got everything I need

You’re the one thing I’ll never leave



When the world breaks down and I’m on my knees



I’ll be with you as long as I can breathe

I’ve got everything I need you’re all i need

Romanization

I love my routine

She says its boring but I know deep inside you like it too

You just don’t want to admit its so good

Wake up at 6 1 lemon drink Pack my bags up and head straight for the gym

Shower at 9 Egg yolk look fine Sun shining bright need my glasses to drive

Some people say that It’s better live on the edge and be free

Yeah I can’t deny why its fun to be drunk and be wild

But don’t feel so bad cuz Spontaneous life I don’t think that’s for me

I feel better than ever so let me be

isi.lyrics:
Lyric WISH & Kang Kyun Sung (Noel) - 우리를 바라보면 (Our Reflection)

Romanization

heurithaejin chueok sok eodinggaeseo
chamaogo akkyeoon nummuri heulleo

uri durui gyejeoreul dorikyeo bomyeo
gipi jamdeureun neoreul dasi kkaewobogon hae

chimmugi jayeonseureowojimmangkeum
neomu meoreojin sai geujeo baraman bone

uril barabomyeon gaseumi aryeowa
deo apeugi jeone noajul subakke

uril barabomyeon eojjeol su eopseo

yeogikkajirago
geuripda haedo chatji maljago

ige uri choeseonin deuthae

gakkeumssik chueok hanal yeoreoboja

numbusin neowa na geogi
seommyeonghi bitnal teni

uril barabomyeon gaseumi aryeowa
deo apeugi jeone noajul subakke

uril barabomyeon eojjeol su eopseo

yeogikkajirago
geuripda haedo chatji maljago
ige uri choeseonin deuthae

amureoji anke jal jinaeya hae
i malppuniraseo mianhae da mianhae

nega samkigo samkyeowatdeon geu ttae nummuldeureun

ibyeori doeeoseo naege oneunggeol

uril barabomyeon gaseumi aryeowa
deo himdeulji anke tteonajul subakke

uril barabomyeon meolgeman boyeo

yeogikkaji rago goeropda haedo chatji maljago

ije uri ibyeoreul malhae

Hangeul

흐릿해진 추억 속 어딘가에서
참아오고 아껴온 눈물이 흘러

우리 둘의 계절을 돌이켜 보며
깊이 잠들은 너를 다시 깨워보곤 해

침묵이 자연스러워진만큼
너무 멀어진 사이 그저 바라만 보네

우릴 바라보면 가슴이 아려와
더 아프기 전에 놓아줄 수밖에

우릴 바라보면 어쩔 수 없어

여기까지라고
그립다 해도 찾지 말자고

이게 우리 최선인 듯해

가끔씩 추억 하날 열어보자

눈부신 너와 나 거기
선명히 빛날 테니

우릴 바라보면 가슴이 아려와
더 아프기 전에 놓아줄 수밖에

우릴 바라보면 어쩔 수 없어

여기까지라고
그립다 해도 찾지 말자고
이게 우리 최선인 듯해

아무렇지 않게 잘 지내야 해
이 말뿐이라서 미안해 다 미안해

네가 삼키고 삼켜왔던 그 때 눈물들은

이별이 되어서 내게 오는걸

우릴 바라보면 가슴이 아려와
더 힘들지 않게 떠나줄 수밖에

우릴 바라보면 멀게만 보여

여기까지 라고 괴롭다 해도 찾지 말자고

이제 우리 이별을 말해

Hangeul

빈 시간 속에 널 찾으려
힘겹게 애를 써도
난 헝클어진
기억에 서러워지고

간직하고 싶었던
소중했던 추억까지도
희미해 나를 혼자
외롭게 쓸쓸하게 해

널 이해할 수 없는 말들로
견뎌낼 수 없는 상처를 만들던
그 순간들 앞에 초라하게만
남겨진 우리였을 뿐

기억하지 못한 말들도
더 아름답지 않게
사라져 가는 내 마음을 찾을 때까지
조금만 더 머물러줘

기억하지 못한 말들도
더 아름답지 않게
사라져 가는 내 마음을 찾을 때까지
조금만 더 머물러줘
isi.lyrics_timestamp:
빈 시간 속에 널 찾으려 
힘겹게 애를 써도
난 헝클어진 
기억에 서러워지고

간직하고 싶었던 
소중했던 추억까지도
희미해 나를 혼자 
외롭게 쓸쓸하게 해

널 이해할 수 없는 말들로
견뎌낼 수 없는 상처를 만들던
그 순간들 앞에 초라하게만 
남겨진 우리였을 뿐

기억하지 못한 말들도
더 아름답지 않게 
사라져 가는 내 마음을 찾을 때까지
조금만 더 머물러줘

내 안에서 숨 쉬어 줘
힘겹게 얘기해도
난 멀어지는 기억에 서글퍼지고

영원할 것 같았던 
소중했던 추억까지도
떠나가 나를 혼자 
외롭게 남겨두는 걸

널 이해할 수 없는 말들로
견뎌낼 수 없는 상처를 만들던
그 순간들 앞에 초라하게만 
남겨진 우리였을 뿐

기억하지 못한 말들도
더 아름답지 않게 
사라져 가는 내 마음을 찾을 때까지
조금만 더 머물러줘

그 햇살의 기억도
더는 아무런 설렘도 남겨주지 않았고
수없이 속삭인 말들도
이젠 따뜻함을 잃어 차갑게만 굳어져

아무것도 아닌 말들로
참아낼 수 없는 상처를 만들어
그 시간들 앞에 초라하게만
남겨진 우리였을 뿐

기억하지 못한 말들도
더 아름답지 않게 
사라져 가는 내 마음을 찾을 때까지
조금만 더 머물러줘
